---
title: "MYtraits: a living trait database for the Malaysia flora"
---

::: {.callout-note}
The MYtraits database and R package are coming soon. Thank you for your patience as it is currently a personal endeavor without much funding. Please feel free to [email me](mailto:hrlai.ecology@gmail.com) to discuss further or know more.
:::

An accessible database is crucial to coordinate fundamental research, species management, ecosystem restoration and public mainstreaming. I am building the MYtraits database that is integrated with the statistical programming software R {{< fa brands r-project >}}.
